docs.title: Q2 2026 budget figures (captured)
docs.description: Use when you need the primary recorded numbers behind the cashflow concept — the immutable Q2 2026 capture.

docs.title: Household cashflow
docs.description: Use when reasoning about monthly money in/out, recurring obligations, or how many months of runway the reserve covers.

docs.title: Finances
docs.description: Use when reasoning about household money — cashflow, recurring obligations, runway. Productivity domain on the OKF floor.

docs.title: Furnace filter
docs.description: Use when you need the furnace filter size or replacement schedule. The canonical low-stakes reference fact.

docs.title: House systems at a glance
docs.description: Use when you need an overview of the house's major systems (HVAC, water, electrical) and their service state.

docs.title: Home
docs.description: Use when reasoning about the house — systems, maintenance schedules, standing facts. Productivity domain on the OKF floor.

docs.title: Knowledge Bundle (demo)
docs.description: Use when orienting to this demo bundle — the root index over the finances and home domains that demonstrate the Knowledge methodology in practice.
